## Problem or workflow

What user workflow should this improve?

## Proposed behavior

Describe the desired behavior.

## Editor area

Which part of the product does this affect?

- Canvas
- Layers
- Assets
- Inspector
- Text
- Shape
- Page management
- Import/export
- Landing page
- Other:

## Responsive requirements

Should this work differently on desktop, tablet, or mobile?

## Additional context

Add screenshots, references, or examples if useful.
